calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2022 Off Calendar

Joint Motion To Dismiss Action
Off Calendar Jul-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. TIMOTHY KOLESK, Esq. of Gibson Dunn & Crutcher LLP (Tel: 415-393-8200) for defendant DoorDash, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JARED ROSSEL's Joint Motion To Dismiss Action.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Jared Roussel and defendant DoorDash, Inc.'s unopposed "joint motion to dismiss this action" is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/RBU)
